title: phegopteris oyamensis
intro: Phegopteris oyamensis, also known as the Japanese chain fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its delicate fronds and chain-like rhizome. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phegopteris oyamensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
